description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house complex with a flat roof and multiple attached structures, including a detached garage and a covered patio area. The main building features white and beige exterior walls, large windows with wooden shutters, and several outdoor living spaces such as a pergola, a pool, and a garden area. The property is landscaped with palm trees and paved walkways, and a driveway leads to the garage where a car is parked. The backyard includes a swimming pool surrounded by a deck and a shaded lounge area. The house has a clean, geometric design with straight lines and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The overall layout suggests a contemporary suburban residence designed for comfort and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a detached garage, pool, and landscaped yard with palm trees and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with car, detached garage, and pergola-covered patio.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, shaded lounge area, and garden with palm trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the covered patio, main house facade, and garage with adjacent landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, garage, and additional palm trees along the walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and wooden shutters
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, adjacent pergola, and paved approach, accented by landscaping and a detached garage.
